---
title: Birth outcomes
subtitle: Pilot work on birth outcome prediction, using cardiotocography (CTG) data and causal inference methods
image: screenshot.png
---

I worked on this from **October 2023 to April 2024**, supervised by **Mike Allen**.

I was reviewing and synthesising existing literature to help establish a foundation for this research.

<iframe
  class="auto-preview"
  width="100%"
  height="800"
  src="https://birth-outcomes.github.io/birth_outcomes_summary/"
  title="Pilot work on birth outcomes">
</iframe>
